title: Shredder (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]|the [[Shredder (machine)|machine]] used for document disposal}}
'''''Shredder''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. It was destroyed while attempting to stop the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Raider (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Raider'']] stealing food from a [[Grain/Legends|grain]] supply depot located in an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
